translations.### App Store Connect API 2.0+ Customer: ### App Store Connect API 2.0+ Customer Reviews Trial
translations.### App Store Connect API 現已支援 讀取和管理 Cus: ### App Store Connect API Now Supports Reading and Managing Customer Reviews
translations.#### App Store Connect API 存取方式\n\n: #### App Store Connect API Access Methods
translations.#### Signed Token (JWT, JSON Web Token): #### How to Generate a Signed Token (JWT, JSON Web Token)
translations.#### 使用 [JWT.IO](https://jwt.io/){:targe: #### Generate JWT using [JWT.IO](https://jwt.io/){:target="_blank"} or the Ruby example below
translations.#### 建立 App Store Connect API Key\n\n: #### Creating an App Store Connect API Key
translations.**⚠️ 切勿外洩 .p8 Key File⚠️**\n\n: **⚠️ Do Not Leak the .p8 Key File ⚠️**
translations.**⚠️ 您只能存取您有權限的 App 評價資料⚠️**\n\n: **⚠️ You can only access App review data for apps you have permission to view ⚠️**
translations.**⚠️ 注意：官方預計在 2022/11 取消原本的 XML (RSS) 存取: **⚠️ Note: Apple plans to discontinue the original XML (RSS) access method in November 2022.**
translations.**一 是** 透過訂閱 [Public RSS](https://rss.it: **One method** is subscribing to the [Public RSS](https://rss.itunes.apple.com/zh-tw){:target="_blank"}, but this RSS lacks flexible filtering, provides limited information, has quantity limits, and we occasionally encounter data inconsistencies, making it unstable.
translations.**二 是** 透過 [**Fastlane**](https://fastla: **2.** Using [**Fastlane**](https://fastlane.tools/){:target="_blank"} **— [SpaceShip](https://github.com/fastlane/fastlane/tree/master/spaceship){:target="_blank"}** to handle complex web operations and session management, it fetches review data from the App Store Connect backend (essentially acting as a web scraper that simulates a browser to crawl the backend).
translations.**最終會得到類似以下的 JWT 結果：**\n\n: **The final result will be a JWT similar to the following:**
translations.- Success! 🚀 We can now fetch App review:
- Success! 🚀 We can now fetch App reviews using this method. The data is complete and fully automatable, requiring no manual routine maintenance (although the JWT will expire, the Private Key will not. We can generate a new JWT for each request by signing with the Private Key).

- For other filter parameters and operation methods, please refer to the [official documentation](https://developer.apple.com/documentation/appstoreconnectapi/list_all_customer_reviews_for_an_app){:target="_blank"}.
translations.- The advantage is complete and stable d:
- The advantage is complete and stable data; we have integrated it for a year without any data issues.

- The downside is that the Session expires every month and requires manual re-login. Also, Apple ID now universally requires 2FA verification, so this step must be done manually to generate a valid Session. Additionally, if the IP used to create the Session differs from the IP used to access it, the Session will expire immediately (making it difficult to run bots on networks with dynamic IPs).
translations.- The token expires irregularly every mo: - The token expires irregularly every month, requiring frequent updates, which becomes really annoying over time; moreover, this "**Know How**" is actually hard to transfer to other colleagues.
translations.- `APPID` can be obtained from the App S: - `APPID` can be obtained from the App Store Connect dashboard:
translations.> **⚠️ Do Not Leak the .p8 Key File ⚠️**: > **⚠️ Do Not Leak the .p8 Key File ⚠️**
translations.> **⚠️ Note: Apple plans to discontinue: > **⚠️ Note: Apple plans to discontinue the original XML (RSS) access method in November 2022.**
translations.> **⚠️ You can only access App review da: > **⚠️ You can only access App review data for apps you have permission to view ⚠️**
translations.> But since there was no other way, it h: > But since there was no other way, it had to be done like this, until I received news this morning...
translations.> ⚠️ Note: This Key can only be download: > ⚠️ Note: This Key can only be downloaded once, so please **keep it safe**. If lost, you must revoke the existing one and create a new one. ⚠️
translations.App Store Connect API 2.0+ 全面更新，支援 In-ap: App Store Connect API 2.0+ Comprehensive Update, Supporting In-app Purchases, Subscriptions, and Customer Reviews Management
translations.In-app purchases、Subscriptions 我沒碰，Custo: I haven’t worked with In-app purchases or Subscriptions, but Customer Reviews excite me a lot. I previously published an article titled [**AppStore APP’s Reviews Slack Bot 那些事**](../cb0c68c33994/) exploring how to integrate app reviews into workflows.
translations.[Upcoming transition from the XML feed t: [Upcoming transition from the XML feed to the App Store Connect API](https://developer.apple.com/news/?id=yqf4kgwb){:target="_blank"}
translations.`APPID` 可從 App Store Connect 後台取得：\n: `APPID` can be obtained from the App Store Connect dashboard:
translations.```json\n{\n iss: 'YOUR_ISSUE_ID',\n i:
```json
{
  iss: 'YOUR_ISSUE_ID',
  iat: TOKEN creation time (UNIX TIMESTAMP e.g 1658326020),
  exp: TOKEN expiration time (UNIX TIMESTAMP e.g 1658327220),
  aud: 'appstoreconnect-v1'
}
```
translations.```ruby\nrequire 'jwt'\nrequire 'time'\n:
```ruby
require 'jwt'
require 'time'

keyFile = File.read('./AuthKey_XXXX.p8') # YOUR .p8 private key file path
privateKey = OpenSSL::PKey::EC.new(keyFile)

payload = {
            iss: 'YOUR_ISSUE_ID',
            iat: Time.now.to_i,
            exp: Time.now.to_i + 60*20,
            aud: 'appstoreconnect-v1'
          }

token = JWT.encode payload, privateKey, 'ES256', header_fields={kid:"YOUR_KEY_ID", typ:"JWT"}
puts token


decoded_token = JWT.decode token, privateKey, true, { algorithm: 'ES256' }
puts decoded_token
```
translations.`exp TOKEN 失效時間` ：會因為不同存取功能或設定有不同的時間限制，有: `exp TOKEN expiration time`: varies depending on the access function or setting; some can be permanent, while others expire after over 20 minutes and require regeneration. For details, please refer to the [official documentation](https://developer.apple.com/documentation/appstoreconnectapi/generating_tokens_for_api_requests#3878467){:target="_blank"}.
translations.⚠️ 注意：這個 Key 只能下載一次請 **妥善保存** ，若遺失只能 Rev: ⚠️ Note: This Key can only be downloaded once, so please **keep it safe**. If lost, you must revoke the existing one and create a new one. ⚠️
translations.今早收到 [Apple 開發者最新消息](https://developer.a: This morning, I received the [latest news from Apple Developers](https://developer.apple.com/news/rss/news.rss){:target="_blank"}. The App Store Connect API now supports management of In-app purchases, Subscriptions, and Customer Reviews, allowing developers to integrate Apple’s development process more flexibly and efficiently with CI/CD or business backend systems!
translations.但因為沒有其他方法，所以也只能這樣，直到今天早上收到消息….\n\n: But since there was no other way, it had to be done like this, until I received news this morning...
For other filter parameters and operation methods, please refer to the [official documentation](https://developer.apple.com/documentation/appstoreconnectapi/list_all_customer_reviews_for_an_app){:target="_blank"}.
translations.同理我們可以透過 API 去存取管理 ( [API Overview](http: Similarly, we can access and manage through the API ( [API Overview](https://developer.apple.com/app-store-connect/api/){:target="_blank"} ):
translations.在 App Store Connect API 還沒支援之前，只有兩種方法能獲取: Before the App Store Connect API was supported, there were only two ways to get iOS app reviews:
translations.壞處是 Session 每個月都會過期，要手動重新登入，而且 Apple ID: The downside is that the Session expires every month and requires manual re-login. Also, Apple ID now universally requires 2FA verification, so this step must be done manually to generate a valid Session. Additionally, if the IP used to create the Session differs from the IP used to access it, the Session will expire immediately (making it difficult to run bots on networks with dynamic IPs).
translations.好處是資料齊全、穩定，我們串接了一年沒有遇到任何資料問題。\n: The advantage is complete and stable data; we have integrated it for a year without any data issues.
translations.成功！🚀 我們現在可以使用這個方式撈取 App 評價，資料完整且可以完全交給機器: Success! 🚀 We can now fetch App reviews using this method. The data is complete and fully automatable, requiring no manual routine maintenance (although the JWT will expire, the Private Key will not. We can generate a new JWT for each request by signing with the Private Key).
translations.我已基於新的 App Store Connect API 開發了新的 「 [ZR: I have developed a new "[ZReviewTender — Free and Open-Source App Reviews Monitoring Bot](../e36e48bb9265/)" based on the new App Store Connect API.
translations.有了 Token 我們就能來打看看 App Store Connect API！: With the Token, we can start making requests to the App Store Connect API!
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.每個月不定時過期，要不定時去更新，時間久了真的很煩；而且這個 「 **Know: The token expires irregularly every month, requiring frequent updates, which becomes really annoying over time; moreover, this "**Know How**" is actually hard to hand over to other colleagues.
translations.用一個 Ruby 檔案做了以上流程，可直接 Clone 下來填入資料即可測試使用: A Ruby file was created to handle the above process, which you can directly clone, fill in the details, and test.
translations.首先我們要登入 App Store Connect 後台，前往「Users an: First, log in to the App Store Connect dashboard, then go to "Users and Access" -> "Keys" -> "[**App Store Connect API**](https://appstoreconnect.apple.com/access/api){:target="_blank"}":
translations.點擊「+」，輸入名稱和權限；權限細則可參考官網說明，為了減少測試問題，這邊先選擇: Click the "+" button, enter the name and permissions; for detailed permissions, refer to the official documentation. To minimize testing issues, select "App Manager" here to grant full permissions.
translations.點擊右方「Download API Key」下載保存你的「AuthKey_XXX: Click the "Download API Key" button on the right to download and save your "AuthKey_XXX.p8" key.
